meta.purpose: Incremental official-source audit for 2026 Numata Bench Press Lot86-90. This batch records a conservative search pass only; database.json and research-candidates.json are intentionally unchanged because no additional source-linked historical rows were confirmed to promotion standard in this pass.
sourcePriority: Official or high-trust result pages/PDFs only

preflight.duplicateBatchSearch: No open PR was found before this run. Repository search did not find an existing Lot86-90 audit batch in main or open PRs before this branch. Main data/database.json retains layoutTemplate v5.9.6_LOCK.

processedAthletes.name: 杉本 博夢
processedAthletes.identityBasis: Roster skeleton row exists in data/database.json as Lot86; sex, class, team, and declared best remain marked 要確認 in the skeleton. No additional high-trust historical result row was confirmed in this pass.

processedAthletes.identityBasis: Roster skeleton row exists in data/database.json as Lot89; same name also appears elsewhere in the roster skeleton. This pass did not promote additional rows because any history must be tied to the correct roster identity and source-linked without inference.

databaseUpdate.reason: No confirmed historical rows beyond the existing roster skeleton met the source-linking and identity standard in this small batch. The canonical DB was not rewritten.

candidateUpdate.reason: Search results did not produce useful but ambiguous athlete-history candidates worth preserving; no uncertain achievement was inferred.

sourceAudit.label: Repository main data/database.json
sourceAudit.usedFor: Confirmed that Lot86-90 roster skeleton rows exist and that histories are empty before this batch; confirmed v5.9.6_LOCK remains the layoutTemplate.

sourceAudit.label: GitHub open PR search
sourceAudit.usedFor: Checked that no open PR needed merging or conflict review before creating this safe audit branch.

sourceAudit.label: Web search: official/high-trust Japanese name sweeps
sourceAudit.usedFor: No reliable confirmed row was found for Lot86-90 through Japanese name-based HPA/JPA/high-trust search strings in this pass.

sourceAudit.label: Web search: romanized Goodlift/IPF sweeps
sourceAudit.usedFor: Romanized searches were checked for Goodlift/IPF-style references. Generic false-positive results and unlinked namesakes were not preserved as candidates.

sourceAudit.label: HPA official source family
sourceAudit.usedFor: Maintained source priority for Hokkaido official PDFs. No additional Lot86-90 historical rows were promoted from HPA in this pass.

sourceAudit.label: JPA official source family
sourceAudit.usedFor: Maintained national official-source priority. No additional Lot86-90 historical rows were promoted from JPA in this pass.

notes: No achievements, records, placements, or totals were invented or inferred.
Because no candidate-quality ambiguous results were found, data/research-candidates.json was left unchanged.
A4 print layout and v5.9.6_LOCK files were not modified.

北村 妙美 appears at both Lot56 and Lot89 in the roster skeleton; this batch did not infer whether those entries represent the same athlete. Any future promotion must preserve lot-specific identity evidence.
